program.name: Quizlet
program.policy_source_reason: Network access, external links, and program-target interaction were explicitly disallowed for this intake.

notes: No target, policy page, or external source was opened.
Scope must be verified by a human from an authoritative program source before any testing.

allowed_prepare_only_actions: Maintain local intake documents under docs/intakes/quizlet/.
Review templates locally without opening program targets or external links.
Record future human review requirements without collecting secrets or account data.
prohibited_actions: Network access to program assets or external references.
Automatic submission, merge, or pull request creation from inside this intake workflow.
open_questions: What is the current authoritative scope?
What vulnerability classes are accepted, excluded, or require special permission?
What evidence format does the program require?
What duplicate or known-issue guidance applies?
